docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AStomach}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{AStomach} - \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{AStomach}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{AStomach} + \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AGut} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet1}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet2}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{AStomach} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AGut} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmGMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGutMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmGMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet2}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} - \mathit{C14}\cdot \mathit{ALiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C16}\cdot \mathit{ARBC} + \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{C9}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C10}\cdot \mathit{ARest}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ADaily-Uptake}]}{dt} = \mathit{C6}\cdot \mathit{ATI} - \begin{cases} \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} - \begin{cases} \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}\cdot (1-\mathit{C7})& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}-\mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases}\)
